title: Endometriosis Doesn't Just Cause Pain. It Rewires the Brain for Rage.
description: 190 million women with endometriosis are routinely told their anger is a personality problem. New research across neuroscience, immunology, and endocrinology reveals it is a biological symptom — driven by neuroinflammation in the thalamus and hippocampus, estrogen-mediated limbic dysregulation, and a decade of compounding medical trauma. This is what the healthcare system has been misreading as difficult patients.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Endometriosis Doesn't Just Cause Pain. It Rewires the Brain for Rage.
